title: 25年收入多维分析，并进行图表说明占比和对比
canonical_question: 25年收入多维分析，并进行图表说明占比和对比

payload_ref.sql_text:
SELECT 
    product_line,
    product_l1,
    area,
    SUM(avenue) AS total_income,
    ROUND(SUM(avenue) / (SELECT SUM(avenue) FROM ods_jfcxexcel_shouru_dlt_m WHERE STR_TO_DATE(date_rq, '%Y-%m-%d') >= '2025-01-01' AND STR_TO_DATE(date_rq, '%Y-%m-%d') <= '2025-12-31') * 100, 2) AS income_percentage
FROM ods_jfcxexcel_shouru_dlt_m
WHERE STR_TO_DATE(date_rq, '%Y-%m-%d') >= '2025-01-01'
  AND STR_TO_DATE(date_rq, '%Y-%m-%d') <= '2025-12-31'
GROUP BY product_line, product_l1, area
ORDER BY total_income DESC;

chart_specs.title: 对2025年的收入进行多维度分析，包括各项收入占比、不同维度间的对比关系，并以图表形式展示结果（product_line × income_percentage）
